name: ADHD phenotype algorithm
description: This test case evaluates the ability to identify ADHD cases using a complex phenotype algorithm that requires specific ICD-9 diagnosis codes (314.x series for ADHD/hyperkinetic disorders) while excluding patients with certain neurological and psychiatric conditions that could confound the diagnosis. The algorithm represents a research-grade phenotype with multiple inclusion/exclusion criteria typical of eMERGE network studies.
prompt: Find all patients diagnosed with ADHD or hyperkinetic disorders who are at least 4 years old, excluding those with dementia, brain tumors, or severe developmental delays.

required_codes.display: Other specified manifestations of hyperkinetic syndrome
